category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a graphical client for the Soulseek peer-to-peer network; official homepage says the same.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses Nicotine+; source_facts.name is nicotine-plus.
docs_sources: Official site hosts documentation pages for downloads, development, and the Soulseek protocol.
repo_sources: Official homepage links "source code" to the nicotine-plus GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Soulseek P2P; official homepage says Nicotine+ is written in Python and uses GTK.
